warnings: fukui_charge_conservation_f+: sum(f+) = 1.0000 (should be ~1.0; large drift suggests an N±1 state did not converge)
fukui_charge_conservation_f-: sum(f-) = 1.0000 (should be ~1.0; large drift suggests an N±1 state did not converge)

prose:
Fukui reactivity analysis of aniline computed with DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level (chemkit tier 'standard'), gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1, using PySCF with exact four-center two-electron integrals (density fitting off). Geometry taken as-is from the user-supplied 14-atom aniline.xyz (single point at fixed geometry; no re-optimization by this task). Fukui descriptors were obtained by the finite-difference (delta-N = +/-1) scheme on Mulliken partial charges of the neutral (N), cation (N-1, charge +1, doublet), and anion (N+1, charge -1, doublet) states.

Headline results (dimensionless Fukui indices):
- Most electrophilic site (largest f+, susceptible to nucleophilic attack): C3 (0-based index 2, 1-based label 3), f+ = 2.2975867 (the reported headline value).
- Most nucleophilic site (largest f-, susceptible to electrophilic attack): N1 (0-based index 0, the amino nitrogen), f- = 0.20452359.

Charge conservation passed: sum(f+) = 1.0000 and sum(f-) = 1.0000. Integrity gate: status = ok, trustworthy = true.

Method used: DFT, B3LYP/def2-TZVP (tier 'standard'), gas phase, PySCF; Fukui functions via finite-difference on Mulliken charges.

Caveat on absolute magnitudes: the N+1 (anion) Mulliken charges are very large in magnitude (e.g. about -2.52 e on carbons, +2.22 e on a carbon), inflating the absolute f+/dual-descriptor values. This is the well-known problem of binding an extra electron to a molecule with no positive electron affinity in a large basis (the added electron is poorly bound at def2-TZVP), so absolute f+ magnitudes should be interpreted cautiously even though the integrity checks pass and the descriptors sum to 1; the relative ranking of sites remains meaningful.

Reproducibility: command = cli.py fukui .../aniline/aniline.xyz --method dft --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --tier standard --charge 0 --mult 1 --accept-defaults --stdout path --out ... ; result JSON at /home/erobles/aniline_fukui_dft.json; bar-chart PNG at .../20260704-045118_aniline_fukui_reactivity/agent_call_01_plot.png. A live <fukui>_<timestamp>.out log is streamed to the run cwd during execution.

Warnings: the engine returned no populated 'warnings' array; the three integrity checks all returned ok with severity 'warning' (informational thresholds, not triggered) and are reproduced verbatim in the warnings field. No experimental/literature comparison is offered.
